results.title: hephaestus-panel04-full
results.prompt: Render this storyboard panel as a finished, standalone, full-frame cinematic image: insert close-up of the smith's hands cradling a gold automaton's face and shoulder. Match the art style, palette, the bearded blond smith Hephaestus, and the gold automata of the reference. ONE single full image only — no grid, no panels, no borders, no text, no labels, no captions.

resolved_params.system_prompt: Match the exact painterly cinematic concept-art style, palette, color, and rendering of the reference image — cool electric blue and violet shadow, warm gold automata, orange spark-light, volumetric haze, visible brushwork. Reproduce its look precisely.
